3139060.name: Chico's Rebound
3139060.description:
A Smashing Adventure!

Break blocks, grab powerups, solve puzzles, and beat bosses! When a mysterious tower appears in the forest, Chico the Chipmunk and his new friend Beeatrice decide to go exploring. Waiting inside are a whole host of block-breaking challenges, clever environmental puzzles, and secrets to be unraveled! Help them solve the mystery of the Celestial Tower!

Time for Rebound!

In the block breaking Rebound challenges, you'll be tasked with clearing every block from the stage by bouncing around Chico's trusty giant walnut. Keep a long volley going to get a high score! Do a tail-whip to keep the walnut up and change the angle of the shot. It's simple to play but takes skill to master!

And of course, it's not always that simple. There are over a dozen types of blocks, and power-ups for the walnut. Fire power burns grass blocks, spikes smash through blocks with ease, explosive power breaks stone, and much much more! Try different combinations and see how they interact.

Fans, cannons, ghosts, and more turn each level into a unique challenge! This is block-breaking like you've never experienced it before.

The Celestial Tower

In between Rebound challenges you'll traverse the mysterious Celestial Tower, a large interconnected dungeon full of environmental puzzles! Explore all 6 floors of the tower, unlock new paths, and make your way to the very top! You'll meet a cast of characters who need your help, as they try to complete a secret mission. Can you solve the puzzles, uncover the truth of the Celestial Tower, and save the day?

Express Yourself!

Have fun and show off your unique style! Save up the sunflower seeds you collect, and you can trade them in for special designs for both your walnut and the game's interface! Why not bounce around a watermelon or a paper lantern instead of a walnut? There are a bunch of colors and styles to choose from.
3139060.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
